pre_run_probes.name: ssh_tzeus
pre_run_probes.command: timeout 12 ssh -i ~/.ssh/ecdsa_home -o IdentitiesOnly=yes -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=8 tzeus@tzehouse-windows.parrot-hen.ts.net "whoami; hostname"
pre_run_probes.stderr: ssh: connect to host tzehouse-windows.parrot-hen.ts.net port 22: Connection timed out

pre_run_probes.name: ssh_hudbot
pre_run_probes.command: timeout 12 ssh -i ~/.ssh/ecdsa_home -o IdentitiesOnly=yes -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=8 hudbot@tzehouse-windows.parrot-hen.ts.net "whoami; hostname"
pre_run_probes.stderr: ssh: connect to host tzehouse-windows.parrot-hen.ts.net port 22: Connection timed out

pre_run_probes.name: tcp_ports
pre_run_probes.command: for port in 22 50051 9090; do timeout 6 bash -lc "cat < /dev/null > /dev/tcp/tzehouse-windows.parrot-hen.ts.net/$port" >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "$port open" || echo "$port closed_or_timeout"; done

pre_run_probes.name: grpc_tcp
pre_run_probes.command: timeout 8 bash -lc "cat < /dev/null > /dev/tcp/tzehouse-windows.parrot-hen.ts.net/50051" >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo grpc_tcp_open || echo grpc_tcp_closed_or_timeout

pre_run_probes.name: mcp_http
pre_run_probes.stderr: curl: (28) Connection timed out after 6001 milliseconds

blockers_json.title: Restore TzeHouse reachability before hud-nfl7n release soak
blockers_json.rationale: The required immediate pre-run probes failed: Tailscale reported the Windows peer offline, tailscale ping timed out, non-interactive SSH for tzeus and hudbot timed out on port 22, TCP 22/50051/9090 were closed or timed out, and MCP /mcp did not respond. The release soak cannot start without the reference host and HUD ports reachable.
blockers_json.unblock_condition: TzeHouse is online in Tailscale, tailscale ping succeeds, non-interactive SSH succeeds for tzeus and hudbot with ~/.ssh/ecdsa_home, TCP 22/50051/9090 are open, MCP /mcp returns HTTP 200, and TzeHudBenchmarkOverlay is ready to run against C:\tze_hud\benchmark.toml with the non-default PSK path.

resume_condition: Retry hud-nfl7n after the exact pre-run probes pass and the benchmark HUD task can bind gRPC 50051 and MCP 9090.
